channel.title: sipi.bot
channel.description: The Spend Firewall for AI Agents — approve, block, or flag every agent transaction before a dollar moves. Sits in front of every transaction an autonomous AI agent attempts and evaluates it against your rules in under 5ms. MCP, HTTP, and CLI integration. Flat $99/month.

item.title: sipi.bot — The Spend Firewall for AI Agents
item.description: Your autonomous AI agent has your credit card. sipi.bot approves, blocks, or flags every transaction against your rules — before a dollar moves. Spend controls for the agent economy.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: sipi.bot vs v0 — UI Generation vs Agent Spend Control
item.description: v0 generates UI components from prompts. sipi.bot controls spending for autonomous agents. Different problems: design generation vs financial safety.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: sipi.bot vs Trae — AI Code Editor vs Spend Firewall
item.description: Trae is an AI-powered code editor with agentic capabilities. sipi.bot is a spend firewall that blocks unauthorized agent transactions. Code generation vs s
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: SpendFirewall vs Stripe Spend Controls — Which Is Better in 2026?
item.description: SpendFirewall vs Stripe Spend Controls: Payment fraud prevention. Detailed comparison of features, pricing, and use cases for spend firewall.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: sipi.bot vs OpenAI Spending Limits — AI Agent Spend Control Compared

item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.description: sipi.bot vs Portkey: Portkey is an AI gateway with observability — without per-transaction spend blocking rules. sipi.bot sits in front of every dollar and
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: sipi.bot vs OpenMeter — Usage Metering vs Spend Control
item.description: sipi.bot vs OpenMeter: OpenMeter tracks usage-based billing — sipi.bot is a real-time spend firewall for autonomous agents. Metering vs enforcement.

item.title: Spend Controls for AI Trading Bots
item.description: Trading bots execute orders autonomously. sipi.bot ensures every trade stays within your risk parameters — per-trade limits, daily exposure caps, and veloc
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: Spend Controls for AI Research Agents
item.description: Research agents purchase datasets, API access, and reports autonomously. sipi.bot ensures every purchase is approved, budgeted, and documented.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: SpendFirewall for Multi-Agent Budget Allocation — Built for Your Workflow
item.description: SpendFirewall for multi-agent budget allocation: Allocate and enforce separate budgets for each agent in a multi-agent system.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot
